title: Rewrite keywrap.rs using native wc_AesKeyWrap/wc_AesKeyUnWrap
description: Replace the implementation in wolfcrypt/src/keywrap.rs: (1) Remove AES_set_encrypt_key, AES_set_decrypt_key, AES_wrap_key, AES_unwrap_key imports. (2) Remove the AesKeyGuard RAII struct — no key schedule to zeroize with native API. (3) Rewrite aes_wrap_key: import wc_AesKeyWrap, call wc_AesKeyWrap(kek.as_ptr(), kek.len() as u32, plaintext.as_ptr(), plaintext.len() as u32, out.as_mut_ptr(), out.len() as u32, ptr::null()), check rc > 0, truncate output. (4) Rewrite aes_unwrap_key: same pattern with wc_AesKeyUnWrap. (5) Remove cfg gate wolfssl_openssl_extra — the module now only needs wolfssl_aes_keywrap. Keep input validation (kek len 16/24/32, plaintext multiple of 8 and >= 16, ciphertext multiple of 8 and >= 24). Update module-level docstring to remove EVP references.
